pending.text: Develop a real-time monitoring dashboard displaying instance/application metrics, deployment health status, rollback status, and feedback loop status, including a 'Vitals' panel with historical trends of key performance indicators (deployment success, rollback frequency, Instance Health Score, Stability Index, Predictive Risk Score) and a dynamic waveform visualization for safety parameter adaptation.

Implement conditional color styling across all deployment status indicators, system health metrics, and vital metrics, highlighting deviations from expected values, stability risks, safety parameter thresholds, and active adjustments.
Create a step-by-step flowchart visualization of the deployment rollback process.

Visualize identified causal relationships within deployed systems and GitOps workflows using a 'Causality Map' panel, incorporating a 'Causal Strength' metric to represent the confidence in these relationships.
Display simulation coverage and safety scores for autonomous healing modules in a 'Validation Status' panel.

Integrate XAI insights, visualizing feature importance or decision paths from XAI models within an 'XAI Insights' panel, and include an 'XAI Transparency Score' integrated into relevant vital metrics displays. Utilize a heatmap visualization to display confidence scores associated with each XAI explanation.
